prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SLUICEBOXSET-6PC-BUNDLE-ALUM Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Beginner Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit for Adults Starting to Pan for Gold Description: The ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime.

The backbone of this kit is made up of the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Gold Sluice Box for Gold Prospecting features a 3-piece folding design and a 50-inch gravity fed sluice box channel with zinc plated riffle traps creating this high recovery gold prospecting and mineral collection prospecting and gold panning tool. Extremely portable, folding down in size simply by loosening the connecting wing nuts, it will pack right up into your backpack. You're ready to prospect for gold right out of the package with woven vinyl miners moss included and installed.

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining with the ASR Outdoor Aluminum Folding Gold Sluice Box.

This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere.

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar cheaper models in that they would often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The gold sluice box carry strap is removable and extends to 54 inches so that it can be used both as a hand or shoulder strap. This allows the carry strap to be easily removed when the sluice is in action.

The sluice box riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long, rust-free service Search Terms: gold panning prospecting sifting tools sluice box classifier screen gold panning kit beginner prospecting starter set sluice equipment mining hobby paydirt recovery river creek dredge classifier snuffer bottle suction tweezers vial field gear outdoors adventure treasure Features: - HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket - MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY: Collect more gold with our folding sluice box that incorporates 18 gauage zinc plated water turbulance riffles over woven vinyl, unbacked miners moss with fine gold carpet below that; 3 layers of gold catching material to run through your sluice box do the bulk of the hard work before beginning to pan for gold - EFFORTLESS USE: Everything can be packed up in your backpack ready to deploy. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning - FINE GOLD CLEAN UP ACCESSORIES: Comes with fine gold collection and storage vials to aid in the the process once you're done in the field and processing your clean up; collection vials, magnifying tweezer, 4oz gold snifter bottle and our heavy duty 12.5" gold prospecting sand scoop for feeding your sluice box and keeping your operation going - Included Gold Pan: 10" Diameter with Dual Riffles; Snifter Bottle: 4oz Capacity; Glass Vial: 1 1/3 Dram; Trowel; 4pc Bedrock Quartz Crevice Tool Set === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-Pc Gold Panning Sluice Box Prospecting Kit
